title: T3 Ingestion: First ingestion — review-dimensional (Session 1: harvest + draft)
prompt: Execute the factory's first-ever canonical ingestion (open since 2026-05-18): harvest the code-review dimensional-specialist cluster into canonical/skills/review-dimensional/ — 3 verbatim upstream origins into _source/ (ce-adversarial-reviewer winner + ce-code-review depth-calibration fold + agent-skills code-review-and-quality 4-question-gate fold), a spec-valid provenance.json, and a draft SKILL.md in David's voice. Locked defaults: name review-dimensional, complement (don't replace) David's existing review skills, delivery-review untouched. This is Session 1 (harvest+draft) ONLY — end at rewrite_status 'in-style', never 'ratified' (ratification is David's HITL call in Session 2 / wg-t3-02); finish with an in-progress row in canonical/INDEX.md, a Status append on backlog/2026-05-18-first-ingestion-code-review.md, a Session-2 handoff report at backlog/wargames/proof/T3-01/REPORT.md, and a commit. Spec gaps you hit are report findings, not blockers. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-01-first-ingestion-review-dimensional.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: canonical/skills/review-dimensional/ contains SKILL.md, provenance.json, and _source/ with compound-engineering--ce-adversarial-reviewer.agent.md, compound-engineering--ce-code-review.md, compound-engineering--ce-code-review--references/ (dir), and agent-skills-osmani--code-review-and-quality.md, each byte-identical to its upstream source (diff empty). provenance.json parses (python3 -m json.tool), has 3 origins each with non-empty kept[] and a source_commit, and rewrite_status is exactly 'in-style' — NOT 'ratified'. SKILL.md frontmatter has name/description/argument-hint/allowed-tools, name is review-dimensional, body is <=400 lines and stack-agnostic. canonical/INDEX.md has a review-dimensional in-style row; backlog/2026-05-18-first-ingestion-code-review.md has a '## Status' section and is NOT moved to backlog/done/; backlog/wargames/proof/T3-01/REPORT.md exists with findings + a Session-2 checklist. A commit mentioning review-dimensional exists. Negative: git -C ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins diff --quiet passes and research/ shows no changes (voice anchors, delivery-review, upstream repos, and the frozen corpus all untouched).
